decks.notes: The main focus of this deck is to quickly disrupt the opponent's hand and board through a combination of hand disruption spells like Thoughtseize and removal spells like Go for the Throat and Fatal Push. The deck aims to apply pressure with aggressive creatures like Kaito, Bane of Nightmares and Floodpits Drowner while leveraging the utility of cards like Unholy Annex and Moon-Circuit Hacker. By combining disruptive elements with a proactive game plan, the deck aims to control the board and tempo of the game while steadily whittling down the opponent's life total.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly deal damage to the opponent by playing aggressive creatures and using burn spells. The deck includes efficient creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Soul-Scar Mage, along with powerful burn spells like Burst Lightning and Reckless Rage. Mutavault and Ramunap Ruins provide additional sources of damage, while Emberheart Challenger and Kumano Faces Kakkazan offer versatile removal options. The deck aims to win the game by applying pressure early on and finishing off the opponent with direct damage spells.

The main concept of this Dimir Aggro deck is to disrupt the opponent's hand with cards like Thoughtseize, while using efficient removal spells like Fatal Push and Go for the Throat to control the board. The deck also utilizes powerful creatures such as Kaito, Bane of Nightmares and Sheoldred, the Apocalypse to apply pressure and close out the game quickly. The mana base is carefully constructed to ensure consistent access to both blue and black mana sources, allowing for smooth gameplay and powerful plays throughout the match.

The main concept of this UR Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with fast-paced, low-cost spells and creatures. By utilizing a combination of burn spells like Burst Lightning and Reckless Rage, along with aggressive creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Soul-Scar Mage, the deck aims to quickly chip away at the opponent's life total and establish early board control. The inclusion of cards like Experimental Synthesizer and Stormchaser's Talent also allows for card draw and additional damage potential. The deck's mana base is optimized for consistent spell casting and aggressive plays.

This deck focuses on utilizing powerful black control cards to disrupt the opponent's game plan and maintain board control. It includes a combination of removal spells like Fatal Push and Go for the Throat, hand disruption with cards like Thoughtseize and Duress, and powerful threats like Sheoldred, the Apocalypse and Graveyard Trespasser. The deck also has some key utility lands like Castle Locthwain and Mutavault to provide additional card advantage and versatility. Overall, the strategy is to outvalue the opponent through efficient removal, disruption, and powerful creatures.

This deck focuses on quickly deploying aggressive creatures to overwhelm the opponent, supported by efficient removal and protection spells. With a mix of mana acceleration, evasion, and powerful creatures like Elspeth, Storm Slayer and Surrak, Elusive Hunter, the Selesnya Aggro archetype aims to establish a dominant board presence early in the game. Snakeskin Veil provides protection, while cards like Skyclave Apparition handle opposing threats. The deck's mana base ensures consistent access to its spells, allowing it to apply relentless pressure and win through combat damage.

This deck focuses on using control elements to disrupt the opponent's strategy while maintaining a strong board presence with cards like Badgermole Cub and Graveyard Trespasser. The deck also uses powerful removal spells like Abrupt Decay and Fatal Push to deal with threats efficiently. The inclusion of Sheoldred, the Apocalypse provides a powerful finisher that can quickly take over the game if left unanswered. Overall, the deck aims to outvalue the opponent through card advantage and efficient removal, ultimately leading to a dominant position in the late game.

The main concept of this deck is to efficiently deal damage to the opponent through a combination of low-cost spells and creatures with prowess abilities. By constantly pressuring the opponent with aggressive creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Soul-Scar Mage, while also utilizing burn spells like Burst Lightning and Reckless Rage, the deck aims to quickly reduce the opponent's life total to zero. The deck also includes cards like Experimental Synthesizer and Academic Dispute to provide card advantage and flexibility in dealing with opposing threats. Overall, the deck's strategy revolves around applying consistent pressure and burning down the opponent's life total.

This deck focuses on aggressive play, aiming to quickly deal damage to the opponent by utilizing low-cost creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Emberheart Challenger. The deck is filled with burn spells like Burst Lightning and Reckless Rage to remove opposing threats and ensure a clear path to victory. The inclusion of cards like Kumano Faces Kakkazan and Den of the Bugbear provide additional sources of damage, while Mutavault serves as a versatile creature land. The strategy is to maintain pressure on the opponent and end the game before they have a chance to stabilize.

The deck focuses on utilizing control elements such as counterspells, removal, and card draw to manage the opponent's threats and maintain board control. It includes cards like Teferi, Hero of Dominaria and Supreme Verdict to help stabilize the board and outvalue the opponent. The deck also has a strong emphasis on card advantage, with cards like Consult the Star Charts and Meticulous Archive providing card selection and draw. By carefully managing resources and controlling the game's pace, this deck aims to grind out the opponent and secure victory through card advantage and powerful late-game threats.

The main strategy of this UW Control deck is to control the battlefield and disrupt the opponent's game plan while building card advantage through card draw and manipulation. Cards like Teferi, Hero of Dominaria, Dovin's Veto, and Supreme Verdict help control the board and protect the player's own game plan. There are also cards like Consult the Star Charts and Change the Equation to help draw into key pieces of the deck. The deck aims to outvalue the opponent and win through incremental advantage and powerful finishers like Ultima and Eiganjo, Seat of the Empire.

This Dimir Aggro deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures like Faerie Miscreant, Mockingbird, and Floodpits Drowner. The deck also includes disruption elements like Thoughtseize and Fatal Push to control the board and clear the way for powerful finishers like Kaito, Bane of Nightmares and Sheoldred, the Apocalypse. The goal is to maintain pressure on the opponent while controlling the game with removal spells and disruptive cards, ultimately leading to victory through a combination of aggression and strategic play.

This UR Aggro Pioneer deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with a mix of efficient creatures, burn spells, and card draw. By utilizing a combination of aggressive creatures like Marauding Mako and Vivi Ornitier, along with burn spells like Lightning Axe and Into the Flood Maw, the deck aims to maintain pressure on the opponent while also ensuring card advantage through cards like Proft's Eidetic Memory and Winternight Stories. The deck also includes utility creatures like Jadzi, Steward of Fate and Quantum Riddler to provide additional options and flexibility in gameplay.

This deck focuses on disrupting your opponent's game plan through hand disruption and removal spells, while also controlling the board with powerful threat creatures. It aims to slow down the opponent's strategy and maintain control of the game until it can establish a strong presence on the battlefield with cards like Sheoldred, the Apocalypse and Sentinel of the Nameless City. The mana base is designed to support the deck's control elements and ensure consistency in casting spells. Overall, the deck thrives on disrupting opponents and controlling the game's pace.

The deck focuses on using control elements such as counterspells and removal spells to maintain board control and disrupt the opponent's strategy. It also utilizes card draw and card selection to ensure consistency in drawing key cards. The inclusion of the Companion Yorion allows for additional value by blinking permanents and generating card advantage. Overall, the deck aims to outlast and outvalue opponents by efficiently managing resources and answering threats effectively.

This deck focuses on controlling the game by utilizing a combination of removal spells, card draw, and flexible mana base. It aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy with cards like Lightning Helix and Inevitable Defeat while maintaining card advantage with Tablet of Discovery and Jeskai Revelation. The deck also includes a mix of lands to ensure consistent mana sources and to provide access to different colors of mana. By controlling the board and outpacing the opponent in card advantage, this deck seeks to eventually overpower the opponent and secure victory.
